ACE.summary:
the ACE class has all the constants and functions from the ACE API
Please look in the ADS documentation for more information about the functions and constants.
There is a 32 bits API and a 64 bits API. The ACE class automatically dispatches to the right version of the API.

AceError.summary: List of possible Advantage Error codes

AceTrigEvent.summary: List of possible Trigger event codes

AceTrigOptions.summary: List of possible Trigger option codes

AceTrigType.summary: List of possible Trigger type codes

ACEUNPUB.summary:
the ACEUNPUB class has undocumented constants and functions from the ACE API
There is a 32 bits API and a 64 bits API. The ACEUNPUB class automatically dispatches to the right version of the API.

ADS_MGMT_ACTIVITY_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the server's activity.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_COMM_STATS.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the server's communication statistics.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_CONFIG_MEMORY.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the server's memory configuration.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_CONFIG_PARAMS.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the configuration parameters.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_INDEX_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about an index.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_INSTALL_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the installation.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_RECORD_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about a locked record.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_TABLE_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about a table.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_THREAD_ACTIVITY.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about worker threads.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_UPTIME_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the server's uptime.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_USAGE_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about the server's usage.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADS_MGMT_USER_INFO.summary:
Structure used by the ADS MGMT API to return information about users.
See the ADS documentation for a description of this structure.

ADSADT.summary: This class allows to open the proprietry ADT format using the Advantage driver

AdsCharacterColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing String Columns

AdsCharTypes.summary: List of possible character types and collations.
AdsCharTypes.remarks:
The collations with VFP in their name match the Visual FoxPro collations.
CI in the name means Case Insensitive
AS in the name means Accent Sensitive
BIN in the name means Binary
The names match the entries in "adscollate.adt "

AdsColumn.summary: Class for Ads Column reading / writing

AdsDateColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Date Columns

AdsFieldType.MODTIME.summary: 8 byte timestamp, updated when record is updated

AdsFieldType.ROWVERSION.summary: 8 byte integer, incremented for every update, unique to entire table

AdsFieldType.TIME.summary: 4 byte long integer representing milliseconds since midnight

AdsFieldType.TIMESTAMP.summary: 8 bytes. High order 4 bytes are a long integer representing Julian date.Low order 4 bytes are a long integer representing milliseconds since midnight

AdsGetErrorMessage.summary: Return the Last error message for an ADS operation.
AdsGetErrorMessage.remarks: You have to call this immediately after an error occurs. Otherwise the error message may have been reset by a subsequent operation.

AdsLogicColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Logic Columns

ADSMemo.CloseMemFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.CreateMemFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.Flush.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.GetValue.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.GetValueFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.OpenMemFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.PutValue.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

ADSMemo.PutValueFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsMemo class

AdsMemoColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Memo Columns.

AdsNumericColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Numeric Columns

ADSRDD.summary: The base AdsRDD class from which all Advantage RDDs for X# inherit.

ADSRDD.AppendLock.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.BlobInfo.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.ForceRel.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.GetRec.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.GetValueFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.HeaderLock.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.PutRec.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.PutValueFile.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

ADSRDD.Sort.summary: This method is not supported by the AdsRDD class

AX_AXSLocking_2.summary: Return and set the AXS locking status.

AX_BLOB2File.summary: Writes a BLOB contained in a memo field to a file.
AX_BLOB2File.returns: Returns True (.T.) if the BLOB is written to a file, returns False (.F.) if not.

AX_File2BLOB.summary: Stores the contents of a file into a memo field.
AX_File2BLOB.returns: Returns True (.T.) if the file contents are copied into the memo field; returns False (.F.) if not.

AX_GetAceIndexHandle.summary: Returns the Advantage Client Engine index handle that corresponds with the specified index in the current work area. The handle can be used to call any Advantage Client Engine API directly.
AX_GetAceIndexHandle.returns: An Advantage Client Engine index order handle or 0 if no index was found.

AX_GetAceStmtHandle.summary: Returns the statement handle for the current workarea. This handle can be used to call the Advantage Client Engine directly. Only for use with the AXSQL RDDs.
AX_GetAceStmtHandle.returns: Returns a 0 if there is a problem.

AX_GetAceTableHandle.summary: Returns the table handle for the current workarea. This handle can be used to call the Advantage Client Engine directly.
AX_GetAceTableHandle.returns: Returns a 0 if there is a problem.

AX_IsServerLoaded.summary: Return .T. if Advantage is loaded on the specified location.
AX_IsServerLoaded.remarks: cFileName must start with a drive letter ("X:\") or a UNC path ("\\server\volume\path\")
AX_IsServerLoaded.param: String containing drive letter or server name to check. If the application uses a server name as the parameter, it must include the share or volume name as well. For example, use "\\server\share" or "\\server\vol:"..

AX_PercentIndexed.summary: Indicates the percent completion of an index build

AX_RightsCheck.summary: Return the AXS Rights Checking status.

AX_RightsCheck_2.summary: Return and set the AXS Rights Checking status.

AX_SetCollation.summary: This function specifies which collation language to use when opening tables, opening cursors, or creating tables.

AX_SetConnectionHandle.summary: Sets the connection handle for all successive table opens.
AX_SetConnectionHandle.param: Connection handle that was returned by AdsConnect60

AX_SetExactKeyPos.summary: Returns the Exact Key Position Flag.

AX_SetExactKeyPos_2.summary: Returns and sets the Exact Key Position Flag.

AX_SetPassword.summary: Sets the password to be used for subsequent encryption/decryption operations.

AX_SetServerType.summary: Determines which type of Advantage server the client application can use.

AX_SetSQLTablePasswords.summary: Sets passwords for encrypted tables for use with the AXSQL RDDs.

AX_Transaction.summary: Begins, commits, rolls back, or shows the state of a transaction
AX_Transaction.param: The parameter can be: AX_BEGIN_TRANSACTION, AX_COMMIT_TRANSACTION, AX_ROLLBACK_TRANSACTION, AX_ISACTIVE_TRANSACTION
AX_Transaction.returns: True if the command was successful, False if not.

AX_UsingClientServer.summary: return .T. if the current workarea is using Advantage Server or AIS Server and .F. IF USING Advantage RDD IN a LOCAL mode

AXSQLADT.summary: This class allows to open the proprietry ADT format with SQL Syntax using the Advantage driver

AXSQLRDD.summary: Base class for all advantage SQL RDDs.

CallbackFn.summary: Delegate used by some advantage progress functions

CallbackFn101.summary: Delegate used by some advantage progress functions

CdxBranchPage.summary: This class maps the Branch page from the file in memory Manipulating the page is implemented in the CdxTag class

CdxFileHeader.summary: The CdxHeader class. = Class that maps the File Header to memory The logic around this is in the OrderBag class
CdxFileHeader.remarks: The first page in the file is the FILE Header (Bag Header). | The keylength is fixed to 10 (which is the tag length) The root page of the file header points to the list of tags (which is a LEAF page) The freepage points to the list of free pages at BAG level.

CdxGeneralPage.summary: CdxLeaf page. this class maps the Leaf page from the file in memory Manipulating the page is implemented in the CdxTag class

CdxLeafPage.summary: CdxLeaf page. this class maps the Leaf page from the file in memory Manipulating the page is implemented in the CdxTag class

CdxNode.summary: The CdxNode class. The size of each item is: 8 + Key Size ( the last item doesn't contain a key value, only a pointer to a sub-tree.) The structure of an Item is long page_offset - file offset (within ntx file) where sub-tree is. if there's no subtree, a 0 is stored. long recno - record number for this key value (in the dbf file) char key_value[key_size]

CdxOrderBag.summary: Orderbag = CDX file. Contains one or more orders = Tags

CdxOrderBagList.summary: List of OrderBags (an Orderbag = CDX file)

CdxTag._indexedFields.summary: List of fields that are evaluated for an index expression

CdxTag._NullableKey.summary: Is the index nullable (one or more fields are nullable)

CdxTag._SourceIndex.summary: Start location in buffer for single field index

CdxTagHeader.summary: The CdxTagHeader class. = Class that maps the Tag Header to memory The logic around this is in the CdxTag class

CdxTagList.summary: The CdxTagList class is a special CdxLeaf. Its NodeAttribute must be Root + Leaf = TagList

doc.CdxTreePage: Base class for CDX Tree pages, which are Branch and Leaf pages.

CSV.summary: CSV RDD. For reading and writing semicolon delimited files.

DBF.summary: DBF RDD. Usually not used 'stand alone'

DBF.AddField.summary: Add a Field to the _Fields List. Fields are added in the order of method call

DBF.IsNewRecord.summary: Is the current row a new record (the result of Append())

DbfAutoIncrementColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing AutoIncrement Columns.

DbfAutoIncrementColumn.Read.summary: Read the next autoincrement number from the dbf header

DbfAutoIncrementColumn.Write.summary: Write the next autoincrement number to the dbf header

DBFAXSAdsBeginTransaction.summary: Begins a transaction for all connected servers or for the given server.

DBFAXSAdsBinaryToFile.summary: Retrieves the binary object from the given field and stores it in the specified file.

DBFAXSAdsCommitTransaction.summary: Commits an active transaction on the given connection.

DBFAXSAdsFileToBinary.summary: Stores the contents of the given file as a binary object in the specified field.

DBFAXSAdsFindConnection.summary: Finds a connection handle associated with the server name.

DBFAXSAdsGetConnectionType.summary: Returns the type of Advantage Database Server a connection uses.

DBFAXSAdsInTransaction.summary: Returns a flag to the caller to indicate if the given connection has an active transaction.

DBFAXSAdsIsServerLoaded.summary: Determines if an Advantage server is available.

DBFAXSAdsRollbackTransaction.summary: Rolls back the active transaction on the given connection.

DBFAXSAdsSetServerType.summary: Controls the types of Advantage Database Servers to which the client application can connect.

DBFBLOB.summary: DBFFPT RDD. For DBF/FPT. No index support at this level

DbfCharacterColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing String Columns

DbfColumn.summary: Class for DBF Column reading / writing

DbfColumn.Create.summary: Create a DbfColumn class, used when creating files.

DbfColumn.Create_2.summary: Create a DbfColumn class, based on the definition in the DBF. Used when opening a file.

DbfColumn.GetValue.summary: Get the value from the buffer
DbfColumn.GetValue.param: Record buffer for the current record

DbfColumn.HandleNullValue.param: Record buffer for the current record

DbfColumn.InitValue.summary: Initialize the buffer used for appends. Gets called once when a DBF is opened.

DbfColumn.NewRecord.summary: Update the buffer after appending. For example for AutoIncrement or TimeStamp columns.
DbfColumn.NewRecord.param: Record buffer for the current record

DbfColumn.PutValue.summary: Write the value to the buffer
DbfColumn.PutValue.param: Record buffer for the current record

DbfCurrencyColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Currency Columns.

DbfDateColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Date Columns

DbfDateTimeColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing DateTime Columns.

DBFDBT.summary: DBFDBT RDD. For DBF/DBT. No index support at this level

DbfDoubleColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Double Columns.

DbfHeader.HeaderLen.summary: Number of bytes in the header. (Least significant byte first.)

DbfHeader.IsAnsi.summary: Is the codepage an Ansi codepage

DbfHeader.RecCount.summary: Number of records in the table. (Least significant byte first.)

DbfHeader.RecordLen.summary: Length of one data record, including deleted flag

DbfHeader.Transaction.summary: Flag indicating incomplete dBASE IV transaction.

DbfHeader.Year.summary: Year of last update YY is added to a base of 1900 decimal to determine the actual year. Therefore, YY has possible values from 0x00-0xFF, which allows for a range from 1900-2155.

DbfIntegerColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Integer Columns.

DbfLocking.summary: This structure holds the various settings for locking models

DbfLocking.Direction.summary: Direction of locking, used to calculate file lock offsets and record lock offsets

DbfLocking.Initialize.summary: Set various numbers based on a locking model.

DbfLogicColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Logic Columns

DbfMemoColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Memo Columns. This class returns and writes the block numbers.

DbfMemoColumn.GetValue.remarks: At this level this returns the memo block number.

DbfMemoColumn.PutValue.remarks: At this level this writes the memo block number.

DbfNullColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing the Special Column for NULL values.

DbfNullColumn.GetBit.summary: Read a bit from the specified position

DbfNullColumn.SetBit.summary: Set a bit at the specified position

DbfNumericColumn.summary: Class for reading / writing Numeric Columns

DBFSMT.summary: DBFSMT RDD. For DBF/SMT. No index support at this level

DBFVFP.summary: DBFVFP RDD. DBFCDX with support for the FoxPro field types.

DBFVFPSQL.summary: DBFVFPSQL RDD. DBFCDX with support for the FoxPro field types and a List of Object values as backing collection for the data.

DBTMemo.summary: DBT Memo class. Implements the DBT support.

DBTMemo._GetExtension.summary: Return the extension set with Set.MemoExt or default extension

DELIM.summary: DELIM RDD. For reading and writing delimited files.

Flex.PutValue.param: Data to write. Should be BYTE[] and include the header with the type

FlexArea.summary: FlexArea class. Implements the FTP support.

FlexArea.DecodeValue.summary: Decode the contents of a block, including the block header
FlexArea.DecodeValue.param: The raw block including the 8 byte header

FlexArea.EncodeValue.summary: Encode a value into a FTP block
FlexArea.EncodeValue.param: The value to encode. Allowed are at this moment, String, Logic and byte[]
FlexArea.EncodeValue.returns: Byte array including the 8 byte header with the block length and type

FlexArea.GetBlock.summary: Return the raw data of a block including the 8 byte token

FlexArea.PutBlock.summary: Write a block. When the existing block is 0 or the size is insufficient then a new block is allocated.
FlexArea.PutBlock.param: Pointer to existing block, or 0 when a new block must be allocated
The data to write, including the 8 byte header
FlexArea.PutBlock.returns: The address of the original block (when it fits) or the address of the new block

FlexArea.WriteBlockToFile.summary: Export a block to an external file

doc.FlexMemoToken.Length: This includes the length of the token

GetAceIndexHandle.summary: Returns the Advantage Client Engine index handle that corresponds with the specified index in the current work area. The handle can be used to call any Advantage Client Engine API directly.
GetAceIndexHandle.returns: An Advantage Client Engine index order handle or 0 if no index was found.

MEMOCLASS.summary: Flex Memo class. Implements the FTP support.

NsxIndex.summary: DBFNSX worker class that implements the NSX support.

NtxNode.summary: The NtxNode class. The size of each item is: 8 + Key Size ( the last item doesn't contain a key value, only a pointer to a sub-tree.) The structure of an Item is long page_offset - file offset (within ntx file) where sub-tree is. if there's no subtree, a 0 is stored. long recno - record number for this key value (in the dbf file) char key_value[key_size]

OsCodepage.summary: OS Codepages as used in DBF files.

RDDCLASS.summary: FlexFile RDD. RDD with Flex Memo

SDF.summary: SDF RDD. For reading and writing text files.

SMTMemo.summary: SMT Memo class. Implements the SMT support.

TEXTRDD.summary: Abstract TextRDD. For reading and writing delimited files and SDF files.

TSV.summary: TSV RDD. For reading and writing tab delimited files.
